project_1_title: AskAlma: Advanced RAG Chatbot for IIIT-D Website
project_1_description: Engineered a multi-modal data pipeline to scrape, clean, and augment unstructured GitHub Repository data (Website, Excel, Docs) for a 2,000+ student user base.;Deployed a novel, multi-level retrieval system that improved query response accuracy by over 50% against non-structured data baselines.
project_2_title: Office of Tech Transfer & Management - Platform Development
project_2_description: Led the full-stack development of the OTMT platform, heavily optimizing the stack to operate on a single resource-constrained server (2GB RAM).;Launched a comprehensive solution with 4 core features (Web-Portal, Android App, Admin Panel and Agentic Chatbot), load-tested to serve a target of 2,000+ users.
project_3_description: Built a novel hybrid deep learning model combining a Transformer encoder and a GCN to model complex game dynamics.;Attained a state-of-the-art Macro F1 of 0.61 (from 0.48 baseline) and Lie F1 of 0.30 (from 0.14 baseline), more than doubling detection accuracy.
project_4_description: Fabricated 3+ novel Network-on-Chip (NoC) configurations from scratch using HeteroGarnet.;Benchmarked system performance by simulating diverse traffic distribution patterns (e.g., spiral, random, uniform) at 2 Gbps.
project_5_description: Modeleda10-nodestarnetworktopologyinns-3,evaluating4keyperformancemetrics (throughput, packet drop, latency and jitter) over a 60-second simulation to analyze performance.
indproj_1_description: Spearheaded the investigation of alternative architectural solutions for a project on orbital debris management using neural networks.;Formulated and tested novel data collection strategies, influencing the high-level tech-nical direction for the team’s paper (arXiv:2307.09938).
indproj_2_description: Architected core OS resource managers, including a memory allocator that reduced memory fragmentation by over 20% on average and a testing framework for 3+ CPU scheduling policies.
work_1_description: Architected a complex, multi-faceted evaluation pipeline to validate the core AI system incorporating 10+ stages of Computer Vision and LLM analysis (GPT-4/Claude).;Automated performance validation using a gold-standard dataset, improving testing quality by 70-80% and directly boosting the underlying RAG pipeline’s effectiveness by 15-20%.
work_2_description: Engineered a full-stack resource management platform with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to serve over 300+ stakeholders across 5-6 national project sites.;Centralized the secure distribution of critical assets, including project credentials and technical guidebooks, to improve operational efficiency and data consistency.
